patterns.pattern: ^(You) call down a lightning bolt to destroy (.+)\.$
^(A) bolt of lightning strikes down without warning, transfixing (.+) with its storm\-forged fury\.$
^(You) raise the pressure surrounding the already vulnerable form of (.+) to terrible heights, crushing the life from \w+\.$
^(You) raise the pressure surrounding (.+) to terrible heights, but \w+ manages to struggle free of your intangible grasp\.$
^(\w+) brings \w+ hands together in a resounding clap, but nothing seems to happen\.$
^(You) raise the pressure surrounding the unresponsive form of (.+) to terrible heights, seeking to crush the life from \w+\.$
^(\w+) brings \w+ hands together in a resounding clap, and blood begins to leak from the eyes of (.+)\.$
^(You) form a localised twister, spinning it at incredible speed to form a drill that plunges straight through the magical shield surrounding (.+), utterly destroying it\.$

^The air in front of (\w+) begins to warp, a high pitched whining screach filling your ears\. Then the magical shield surrounding (.+) explodes into translucent shards as if struck by some great force\.$
^(You) send a crushing wave of pressurised air at (.+), pulverising \w+\.$
^(The) wind rises again, battering at (.+) with relentless intensity\.$
^(You) rip the breath from (.+), depriving \w+ of air for several seconds and leaving \w+ gasping and weak\.$
^(\w+) flicks a hand at (.+) who begins struggling to draw breath, \w+ face turning blue\.$
^(You) bring a vacuum into being with (.+) at the centre, denying \w+ any chance at breathing\.$
^(A) violent thud of displaced air heralds the suddenly panic stricken expression upon the face of (.+), \w+ attempts to draw breath clearly failing\.$
^(The) body of (.+) jerks violently, as if struck by some great open handed blow\.$
^You whip up a gale, sending it towards (.+)\.$
^(\w+) whips up a raging gale of wind, sending it towards (.+)\.$
